title: Yudo's VC Interaction (Sculks and Warden)
description: This is an inspired mod from Voice Chat Interaction by henkelmax but unlike that mod, this is running at Neoforge. This mod attracts sensors and warden but it depends on the level of your voice.
body:
Yudo's VC Interaction is a technical immersion mod that bridges the gap between your real-world voice and Minecraft’s most sensitive environment. By integrating directly with Simple Voice Chat, this mod allows Sculk Sensors and Wardens to react dynamically to your actual microphone input.

PS: I am an undergraduate Physics student currently balancing thesis research in BioPhysics with my passion for modding and hardware projects.

Since I'm new to coding JAVA, If you enjoy using Yudo's VC Interaction and want to support the development of this mod (and help fuel my late-night coding sessions/research), consider supporting me! Every bit of help allows me to dedicate more time to maintaining this project and building new, immersive features for the community.
